
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
```


```{r}
n<-1000
x<-(1:n-1)^((sqrt(5)-1)/2)*cos((1:n-1)*2*pi*(sqrt(5)-1)/2)
y<-(1:n-1)^((sqrt(5)-1)/2)*sin((1:n-1)*2*pi*(sqrt(5)-1)/2)
```


```{r}
plot(x,y)
lattice::dotplot(y-x)
data.frame(x,y)-> df
esquisse::esquisser(df)
ggplot(df) +
  aes(x = x, y = y) +
  geom_point(colour = "#112446") +
  theme_minimal()
```


```{r}
df |>
    ggplot()+
    aes(x,y)+
    geom_point()

plot(sin,-pi,pi)
plot(\(x) x^2+1,-pi,pi) #from -pi to pi
angle <- seq(-pi,pi,0.1)
plot(cos(angle),sin(angle))
points(c(1,1,-1,-1,1), c(1,-1,-1,1,1), "l")
data.frame(xc=cos(angle), 
            yc=sin(angle), 
            xs=c(1,1,-1,-1,1,rep(NA,length(angle)-5)),
            ys=c(1,-1,-1,1,1rep(NA,length(angle)-5)))|>
ggplot()+
    geom_path(x=xc, y=yc)+
    geom_path(xs,ys)
```
